# Ewan Croft

Personal site for Anglo-Scottish pagan, poet, and programmer Ewan Croft.

## Design
The site's visual identity is built on technical integrity, using an OKLCH-based colour system (green-tinted neutrals at 150°) and a modular 4pt spacing scale. Decorative elements feature traditional pagan symbolism (pentacle and triskele).

- [Blog](/blog)
- [Projects](/projects)
